name: China Palmer
ai_summary: China Palmer has experience caring for infants and young children, including feeding, scheduling, and safety. Located in Atlanta, GA with a 20-30 mile travel radius, she's available part-time and uses a patient, communicative approach to conflict resolution.

transcripts.q3: Hey, my name is China. I experience taking care of kids, mostly with infants and younger children. I've helped with things like feeding them, keeping them on a schedule playing with them and just making sure they're safe and good. I like working with kids because I enjoy being around them and watching them grow. I like being able to help them learn new things and just be someone they feel comfortable and happy around.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Austell, Georgia, and sometimes Atlanta, Georgia. I'm willing to travel within a reasonable distance around 20 to 30 minutes depending on the shift.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time work right now. I'm pretty flexible with my schedule and I'm available. Most weekdays and some weekends. Depending on the shift. I'm open to work mornings, afternoons, and evenings.
transcripts.q6: When there is conflict between two children as they come, I make sure everything is safe. Well, I make sure everybody is safe, then I'll let each of them. Explain what happened and help them understand each other. And then we figure out a fair solution like Cheryl taking turns.
transcripts.q7: I'd make a great up, kid teacher because I'm patient unreliable and I genuinely enjoy working with kids. I make sure they feel safe and comfortable while keeping things positive and fun.
